summary: Detailed analysis of biography script output for King Baldwin IV. Identifies 3 systemic issues: (1) chapters missing temporal/spatial context at the opening - the reader can't tell when or where events happen, (2) chapter endings are abrupt without thematic closure, (3) outline assigns weak sub_key_data items as standalone chapter events. Includes specific examples from all 15 chapters and proposes solutions at the outline and writing prompt level.
